<!--
Thanks for contributing to Release Flight! Keep PRs focused — one logical
change per PR. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guidelines.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Describe the motivation, not just the diff. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] No proprietary/commercial code, and I didn't change the `@marquee/license` public surface
- [ ] Follows the project [invariants](../CONTRIBUTING.md#non-negotiable-invariants) (RLS, secrets-at-rest, CSRF/auth, SSRF, CSP)

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
